rag_rules: Generate AGREE contracts inside annex agree blocks with valid component type or implementation scope.
Use assume/guarantee syntax with visible identifiers from the component scope.
Express behavior relations using logical operators and temporal recurrence where needed.
generic_rules: Place component type contracts in type scopes; use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
Employ conditional logic with nested if-then-else for branching expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants and equations must declare valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Guarantees should reference only visible ports or declared variables in the same scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-level paths in component type annexes.
Avoid using AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
